pricing: Pendle PT_TO_ASSET 30-minute TWAP prices PT-apxUSD as a discounted claim on apxUSD, then multiplies by Apyx capped collateralization ratio and divides by Chainlink USDC/USD.
notes: Pendle leg is directly PT-to-apxUSD and executable PT-to-apxUSD pricing was reasonably close; main caveat is the custom upgradeable Apyx collateralization-ratio adapter.
